title: Title
description: IEEE ProComm Interactive Lesson Platform hero slide with terracotta gradient background and gold accent.

title: The Problem
description: Teaching Cases are published as PDFs with no pathway to interactive learner experience.

title: The Platform
description: One-paragraph overview: authoring environment, learner delivery, and xAPI compliance built on SmartTextbook.

title: Three Roles
description: Three-column layout covering Volunteer Author, Learner, and Administrator roles.

title: Modular Lesson Structure
description: Eight lesson modules mapped to xAPI Activity Types in a split-panel layout.

title: Volunteer Workflow
description: Horizontal flow from article upload through auto-parse, AI draft, author edits, submit, admin review, to published.

title: Phased Delivery
description: Three-phase roadmap: Proof of Concept (4-6 wks), Volunteer Platform (6-8 wks), Ecosystem Integration (ongoing).

title: Research Study
description: Three research questions covering learning effectiveness, authoring experience, and xAPI trace analysis.

title: Live Demo
description: Closing slide with terracotta background, Try It Now heading, and clickable live demo link.
